name: Carrot and Raisin Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup low-calorie dressing (sugar substitute equivalent to 6 teaspoons sugar)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the shredded carrots, low-calorie dressing, and raisins.
2. Add the salt and mix thoroughly until all ingredients are evenly coated.
3. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours to allow flavors to meld.
4. When ready to serve, place lettuce leaves in individual bowls or on a serving plate.
5. Pour the carrot and raisin mixture over the lettuce leaves.
